exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph On Premises
        User[User]
    end
    subgraph Kubernetes Orchestration
        K8s[Kubernetes Cluster]
    end
    subgraph AWS
        S3[AWS S3]
    end
    subgraph Azure
        AzF[Azure Functions]
    end
    subgraph GCP
        BQ[GCP BigQuery]
    end
    User -->|HTTPS| K8s
    K8s -->|API Call| AzF
    AzF -->|Data Processing| S3
    S3 -->|Data Storage| K8s
    K8s -->|Data Query| BQ
    BQ -->|Analytics| User
    AzF -.-> |Async Processing| S3
    S3 -.-> |Data Retrieval| BQ 
    K8s -.-> |Orchestration| AzF 
    K8s -.-> |Monitoring| BQ
